html:
Exclusive to:

'The Sty' Oddities Emporium is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Palace Pig City and sells a variety of rare Crafting materials to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab, using four Boards, three Ball Pein Hammers and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Window
    • 2.4 Doors
  • 3 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Collector Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Deerclops Eyeball 50
Mandrake 50
Walrus Tusk 50
Down Feather 10
Thick Fur 40
Scales 30
Glow Berry 5
Gears 20
Beefalo Horn 5
Horn 5
Hound's Tooth 5
Silk 5
Volt Goat Horn 5
Cat Tail 4
Bamboo 3

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves, which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Fake Kazoo 1 1
Gord's Knot 1 1
Melty Marbles 1 1

Decor

  • Windchime
  • Scream Catcher
  • Beefalo Mounting
  • Tasteful Fish Mounting
  • Cinderblock Bookshelf

Shelfs

  • Windowed Cabinet

Pillar

  • Planed Wood Column Corner
  • Planed Wood Column Front

Window

  • Round Window

Doors

  • Exit

Gallery

  • The interior of 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium.
StructuresCraftable Items

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cửa hàng kỳ lạ 'The Sty' là một Cấu trúc Cửa hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Thành phố Lợn Cung điện và bán nhiều loại nguyên liệu Chế tạo quý hiếm cho người chơi.
title: 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium

'''<nowiki>'</nowiki>The Sty<nowiki>'</nowiki> Oddities Emporium''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Pig City|Palace Pig City]] and sells a variety of rare [[Crafting]] materials to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]], using four [[Boards]], three [[Ball Pein Hammer|Ball Pein Hammers]] and four [[Pig Skin|Pig Skins]].

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc|Oincs]]. A [[Collector Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:
